Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Let me analyze these interview transcripts to extract the key elements of the invoice approval process Ill start by identifying all the activities decision points roles and artifacts mentioned across the interviews

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: From Interview 1 Mary Accounts Payable Clerk Receives invoice usually by email Checks if invoice has valid PO number If no PO send back to supplier requesting more details If has PO log into accounting system Forwards to purchasing department to confirm receipt of goods services After confirmation matches invoice line items against PO in system If matches send to department manager for approval If discrepancy email purchasing team to clarify If cant resolve escalate to supervisor After manager approval schedule for payment

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: From Interview 2 Dan Purchasing Officer Receives invoice from AP Checks invoice details against PO quantities prices delivery charges If discrepancy contact supplier directly or ask AP to hold invoice until corrected version received If PO number missing tell Mary to get that info If everything correct sends confirmation email back to AP Never approves without confirmed PO reference After confirmation assumes it goes to manager for approval After approval goes to AP for scheduling payment

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: From Interview 3 Carlos Department Manager Receives notification after invoice matched to PO and Dan confirms System shows invoice details PO confirmation If all good approves in system If suspicious big difference in amount unexpected items may reject or ask Mary to hold and investigate After approval goes back to AP for payment cycle

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: From Interview 4 Rita AP Supervisor Comes in for exceptions If Mary cant match invoice or Purchasing has issue missing info discrepancy escalates to Rita Rita contacts suppliers or coordinates between departments Some invoices dont match any PO for informal services works with department heads to create retrospective PO or reject invoice After exceptions cleared goes back to normal flow Purchasing confirmation Manager approval payment scheduling

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: From Interview 5 Karen Supplier Relationship Manager Involved indirectly when invoice doesnt match agreed terms AP or Purchasing loops her in If missing PO number asks supplier to provide it or send revised invoice If pricing discrepancy checks contract and informs AP or Purchasing of correct price Doesnt touch system directly for approvals Helps resolve issues so invoices can move forward

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Now lets try to consolidate this into a coherent process flow

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: So there are two main paths 1 Invoice with PO 2 Invoice without PO which may lead to retrospective PO creation or rejection

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Let me try to model the happy path first invoice with valid PO Happy Path Invoice with valid PO 1 Receive invoice AP Clerk 2 Check for valid PO number If no PO go to exception handling If yes PO continue 3 Log invoice AP Clerk 4 Forward to Purchasing for confirmation of receipt AP Clerk 5 Purchasing checks invoice against PO Dan If discrepancy contact supplier or ask AP to hold If all good send confirmation to AP 6 AP matches invoice line items against PO in system Mary If matches proceed to manager approval If discrepancy email purchasing to clarify If not resolved escalate to supervisor Rita 7 Manager approval If approves proceed to payment scheduling If rejects or holds investigate further 8 Schedule for payment AP Clerk

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Participants Roles Accounts Payable Clerk Mary Purchasing Officer Dan Department Manager Carlos Accounts Payable Supervisor Rita Supplier Relationship Manager Karen Supplier external Artifacts Invoice Purchase Order PO Accounting system Confirmation emails Payment schedule

Name: Abductive Reasoning - IND
Text: This seems redundant Maybe the distinction is Purchasing confirms that goods services were received receipt confirmation Purchasing also checks that invoice details match PO but this seems like APs job

Name: Backtracking - PE
Text: Let me re examine the transcripts

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: So it seems both are doing some form of matching Purchasing checks if invoice details match what was ordered PO AP matches invoice line items against PO in the system This might be a case where theres some overlap in responsibilities or perhaps Dan is doing a preliminary check and Mary is doing a more detailed system based check

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: For the process model we can represent this as 1 AP receives invoice 2 AP checks for PO No PO send back to supplier Has PO continue 3 AP logs invoice 4 AP forwards to Purchasing for confirmation 5 Purchasing checks invoice against PO quantities prices etc If discrepancy contact supplier or ask AP to hold If no discrepancy send confirmation to AP 6 AP receives confirmation from Purchasing 7 AP matches invoice line items against PO in system If matches proceed to manager approval If discrepancy email Purchasing to clarify If not resolved escalate to supervisor Rita 8 Manager approval If approved schedule payment If rejected or held investigate further 9 Schedule payment

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Now lets consider the exception paths From Mary If no PO send back to supplier If discrepancy in matching email purchasing to clarify If cant resolve escalate to supervisor From Dan If discrepancy contact supplier or ask AP to hold From Rita Handles exceptions where Mary cant match invoice or Purchasing has issues For invoices without PO informal services work with department heads to create retrospective PO or reject After clearing exceptions back to normal flow From Karen Helps resolve by contacting supplier or providing contract info From Carlos if he sees something suspicious he may reject or ask to hold and investigate further

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Notes on Ambiguities Conflicts 1 There is some overlap in the matching activities between Purchasing and AP The transcripts suggest Purchasing checks if invoice details match what was ordered PO AP matches invoice line items against PO in the system This may represent two different levels of validation receipt confirmation vs financial accuracy 2 The exact point at which the system sends automatic notifications is not entirely clear but its mentioned that the manager approval is triggered by an automatic email after confirmation 3 The role of the Supplier Relationship Manager Karen is supportive and may be involved in any supplier communication but the exact trigger points are not always specified 4 The process for handling invoices without POs has two paths sending back to supplier or escalating to Rita for retrospective PO creation The transcripts suggest both occur in practice
